data.title: Guyana President Warns of Mineral ‘Dependence’ as Iran War Speeds Shift From Oil
data.description: Guyana President Irfaan Ali warned that shifting too quickly to renewable energy in the wake of the Strait of Hormuz oil crisis could create a new dependence on critical minerals such as lithium, copper and cobalt.
data.keywords: Guyana,Generic 1st 'CL' Future,Iran,War,Renewable Energy,Generic 1st 'HG' Future,Generic 1st 'NG' Future,Persian Gulf,China,Europe,markets
